central_question: Where did roughly $8 billion of FTX customers' money actually go, and how was it taken?
must_establish: What FTX was and the promise it made to customers (your funds are safe / not invested).
Who Sam Bankman-Fried was and the public image (effective altruism, the golden boy).
The hidden mechanism: Alameda's special privileges in the code (the 'backdoor').
Where the money went (trading losses, real estate, donations) — proven vs alleged.
The collapse week (Nov 2022) and the bank-run dynamic.
The trial outcome: convicted on all 7 counts (Nov 2023); 25-year sentence (Mar 2024).
Accurate nuance: bankruptcy recoveries; figures are owed/shortfall, not all permanently lost.
open_questions_to_confirm_before_script_: Exact customer shortfall figure and its source (sentencing record vs bankruptcy estate).
Precise framing of the Alameda credit-limit number vs amount actually drawn.
Which fund uses are court-proven vs reported.
Final restitution/forfeiture status and creditor repayment percentage as of 2026.
sensitivity: R2 — recent, living named defendant. State adjudicated facts; attribute trial assertions; no likeness; no implying guilt of non-convicted individuals.
